title: EMA Trend System with ORB, VWAP & Bias Score - by TenAMTrader

summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: EMA Trend System with ORB, VWAP & Bias Score - by TenAMTrader by TenAM_Trader.

EMA Trend System with ORB, VWAP & Bias Score The EMA Trend System with ORB, VWAP & Bias Score is a streamlined intraday trading tool designed to help traders quickly understand trend direction, market bias, and opening range structure.
This indicator combines EMA trend structure, VWAP positioning, Opening Range levels, daily moving averages, a dynamic EMA cloud, and a weighted bias engine into one clean visual system.
